title: Perfusion Master Program Mission and Vision
content:
Perfusion Master Program Mission and Vision

Vision

To be a nationally and internationally recognized and preferred education unit that has the ability to think critically, can use the acquired knowledge and skills in clinical practice, can establish the relationship between science and technology, raise constructive and creative individuals.

Mission

In the light of the universal values of the Perfusion Undergraduate Program, utilizing the knowledge of science in general, Cardiovascular Surgery, Thoracic Surgery, Intensive Care, Pediatrics, Cardiology, Chest Diseases and Perfusion technology in particular, it is necessary to train Perfusionists who have learned to learn and are specialized in their own field; To enable the student to gain the ability to access, evaluate and interpret information by doing scientific research.
